title: This ancient herb works wonders for your mind and immunity
description: Discover the benefits of Brahmi, an Ayurvedic herb known to support memory, immunity, digestion, and sleep. Try Patanjali Brahmi Sharbat for daily wellness. The post This ancient herb works wonders for your mind and immunity appeared first on News24 .

title: Why sophrosyne, an ancient Greek virtue, matters more than ever in the age of AI
description: Share article Print article Texting while driving. Bullying people on social media. Buying into the latest conspiracy theory. Passing off AI-generated work as your own. That may seem like a random list of 21st-century vices. But I'd argue they're all examples of the loss of one particular virtue: sophrosyne.

title: In 2016, scientists’ fossil reanalysis suggested one forger built the Piltdown Man hoax
description: A century-old scientific scandal is being revisited. The Piltdown Man fossils, once hailed as a human-ape link, are now proven to be a sophisticated hoax. Modern forensic techniques point to a single skilled forger. This discovery highlights how scientific prestige can blind researchers to the truth. The case serves as a crucial lesson for rigorous testing in science.

title: In 2024, a Montana fossil revealed Lokiceratops, one of the strangest horned dinosaurs ever described
description: Scientists unearthed Lokiceratops rangiformis, a massive, ornately horned dinosaur in Montana. This new species, discovered in 2024, boasts unique, asymmetrical frill horns and lacked a nose horn. Its existence in a small, ancient region alongside other ceratopsids suggests rapid local evolution, challenging previous ideas of widespread dinosaur populations and hinting at more undiscovered prehistoric life.
